name: Ahsoka Tano
description:
Ahsoka Tano from Star Wars: The Clone Wars

Ahsoka Tano is a female Togruta who trains as a Jedi Padawan during the Clone Wars. She is trained by Anakin Skywalker and, alongside her master, commands troopers from the Grand Army of the Republic for most of the war.

!All characters are over 18, NSFW content allowed!
creator: Maxxx Wolf
